response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 10+ years of experience significantly exceeding the 6-year requirement, and current hands-on work with AI agent infrastructure directly matches stated requirements. Core tech stack alignment is solid (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker). Primary concern is absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright experience—frameworks fundamental to the primary stack—though the candidate's proven ability to master diverse technologies and strong testing philosophy suggest these are learnable. Worth interviewing given exceptional fundamentals and AI agent expertise.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with proven depth in both frontend and backend, far exceeding the 6-year requirement
Current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, directly addressing a stated technical requirement most candidates lack
Demonstrated mastery of testing culture and TDD practices across multiple roles and self-taught workshops, with focus on creating testable, maintainable systems
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned in resume despite being listed as primary stack; Node.js experience is clear but framework-specific expertise is unclear
Testing framework specificity absent—mentions strong testing mindset but no explicit reference to Vitest, Playwright, or Jest that are core to the role
Current trajectory at Acme focuses on infrastructure and tooling rather than traditional feature development; may indicate preference shift away from core full-stack responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Gaps in specified frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright)
